table-84-84.pgTitle: Schools with K-8 Magnet Programs by City
table-84-84.caption: Of the schools that offers a magnet program serving a grade span of Kindergarten to 8th grade, how many offers Multiple Provision Types? List the number of cities that offers a Kindergarten to 8th grade span and indicate how many schools are there serving such grade span for each city.
